case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS OCAIN, OTIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,151.68 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT OCAIN, OTIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-24-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-09-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF TO RE-SERVE DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCAIN, OTIS $2,151.68 PRINCIPAL, $47.92 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,199.60, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDNAT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
